decks.notes: This Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with early creature drops like Badgermole Cub and Pawpatch Recruit, supported by powerful finishers like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Brightglass Gearhulk. The deck also utilizes cards like Temple Garden and Hushwood Verge to ensure mana consistency, while cards like Seam Rip and Practiced Offense provide removal and additional damage. By combining efficient creatures with strong combat tricks and mana ramp, this deck aims to apply constant pressure and close out games before the opponent can stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures in the early game, supported by cards that provide additional buffs and abilities to maintain pressure. By efficiently utilizing mana resources and maintaining board presence, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and secure victory through a consistent stream of threats. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Gene Pollinator and Surrak, Elusive Hunter allows for some flexibility and versatility in dealing with different types of threats. Ultimately, the strategy revolves around establishing dominance on the battlefield and maintaining pressure to close out the game quickly.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to maintain control of the game through a combination of card draw, removal spells, and card advantage. The deck focuses on using instants and sorceries to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By drawing cards, countering spells, and efficiently removing threats, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and ultimately win through incremental advantages. The inclusion of cards like Gran-Gran and Jeskai Revelation provide card advantage, while removal spells like Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson help control the opponent's creatures.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient creatures like Gene Pollinator and Keen-Eyed Curator, while using combat tricks like Snakeskin Veil to protect them. The deck also utilizes mana acceleration from Llanowar Elves and Hushwood Verge to ramp into powerful threats like Surrak, Elusive Hunter. By overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of creatures and utilizing cards like Practiced Offense to push damage through, this deck aims to win the game before the opponent can establish their own game plan.

The main concept of this Azorius Aggro deck is to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with efficiently costed creatures and spells. By utilizing tempo plays with cards like Springleaf Drum and Quantum Riddler, combined with evasion and card advantage from cards like Sage of the Skies and Momo, Friendly Flier, this deck aims to establish early dominance and maintain pressure throughout the game. The inclusion of powerful threats like Aang, Swift Savior and Starfield Shepherd further solidify the deck's aggressive strategy and potential for quick victories.

The main concept of this deck is to be able to quickly and aggressively control the board and deal damage to the opponent using a combination of cheap spells and creatures. By utilizing cards like Sleight of Hand, Burst Lightning, and Opt, the deck aims to maintain card advantage and tempo while keeping up pressure. The inclusion of cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Stormchaser's Talent further enhances the aggro nature of the deck, allowing for quick damage output. Additionally, cards like Spell Pierce and Get Out help to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining the deck's aggressive nature.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through various removal spells and disruption cards. By using cards like Ketramose, the New Dawn and Requiting Hex, the deck aims to keep the opponent's board under control while generating value through cards like Mazemind Tome and Ghost Vacuum. Strategic Betrayal, Get Lost, and Duress are used to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while Deadly Cover-Up and Pest Control provide additional removal options. The deck also includes some board wipes like Day of Judgment to deal with threats efficiently. Overall, the goal is to outlast the opponent and grind out a victory.

The deck focuses on quickly building up a board of creatures with powerful abilities to overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes mana acceleration from Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to bring out big threats like Ba Sing Se and Surrak, Elusive Hunter. Erode and Earthbender Ascension provide removal and control options, while cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Badgermole Cub generate value and put pressure on the opponent. The deck aims to close out games quickly with a mix of aggressive creatures and efficient spells, utilizing the Selesnya colors for both aggression and utility.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a combination of cheap spells and aggressive creatures. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Slickshot Show-Off to deal damage and control the board, the goal is to maintain pressure and force the opponent to react defensively. The inclusion of cards like Stormchaser's Talent and Colorstorm Stallion further enhances the deck's ability to push damage through quickly. The deck aims to finish the game swiftly before the opponent has a chance to stabilize or mount a counterattack.

This deck focuses on resource management, board control, and card advantage to outlast and outmaneuver the opponent. By utilizing a variety of spells and lands to control the board, while also drawing additional cards and disrupting the opponent's strategy through counterspells and removal, the deck aims to grind out a win through attrition. The key strategy is to efficiently use resources to stay ahead of the opponent and ultimately overwhelm them with card advantage and powerful spells.

This deck focuses on aggressive play using UR Aggro cards to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Utilizing efficient creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, along with versatile spells like Burst Lightning and Stock Up, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and deal damage quickly. The inclusion of cards like Stormchaser's Talent and Flow State helps to further support this aggressive strategy, while also providing some additional card advantage. By maintaining a fast pace and applying constant pressure, this deck aims to secure victory before the opponent can establish their own game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells, while also utilizing cards that provide card advantage and mana ramp. The deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game, while also maintaining card advantage and tempo through cards like Multiversal Passage and Daydream. The inclusion of powerful creatures like Sage of the Skies and Starfield Shepherd allows for a strong board presence, while cards like Erode and Seam Rip disrupt the opponent's game plan. This deck seeks to finish the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence and put pressure on the opponent by utilizing a combination of evasive flying creatures and combat tricks. The deck aims to control the board with cards such as Haliya, Guided by Light and Starfield Shepherd, while also being able to push through damage with cards like Practiced Offense and Quantum Riddler. The deck focuses on utilizing the Azorius colors to maintain tempo and efficiently close out games through a combination of card advantage and aggressive tactics.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using creatures with high power and low mana cost. The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, while also utilizing cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension to enhance the power of the creatures on the battlefield. Escape Tunnel allows for evasion and surprise tactics, while cards like Sazh's Chocobo and Sapling Nursery provide additional creature support. Overall, the goal is to quickly build a strong board presence and apply pressure to the opponent.

The main strategy of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly flood the board with low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Pawpatch Recruit, while also utilizing powerful support cards like Gene Pollinator and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker to enhance their abilities. Surrak, Elusive Hunter can provide additional pressure with his abilities, while Practiced Offense and Brightglass Gearhulk can help buff the team and push for damage. The deck also includes removal and protection spells like Seam Rip and Shardmage's Rescue to ensure that your creatures can keep attacking. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and aggressive playstyle.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively use low-cost spells and creatures to control the board and deal damage quickly. By using cards like Burst Lightning, Stormchaser's Talent, and Sleight of Hand, combined with creatures like Drake Hatcher and Colorstorm Stallion, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient plays. With access to cards like Boomerang Basics for removal and Opt for card selection, the deck can maintain pressure while disrupting the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of Multiversal Passage and Secret Identity provide additional flexibility and options for the player.
